# groundcover_monitor (Resource)

**Deprecated:** use `groundcover_monitor_v2` (see monitor_v2.md) instead. groundcover Monitor resource managed via raw YAML.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `monitor_yaml` (String) The monitor definition in YAML format.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Monitor identifier (UUID).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import groundcover_monitor.example "<id>"
```
